codeReview.summary: Compared with the original failing implementation in 67bb3e6, the fix commit hardens both missed runtime paths: handler ingress now refines project-versus-group hook_source from payload markers before persistence, and deferred head-SHA events now derive discriminated idempotency keys while retaining hook_event linkage to the stored raw payload for later recovery.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared library now documents payload markers for distinguishing group MR webhooks, but it still does not record that deferred-head runs preserve recovery context through review_runs.hook_event_id pointing back to the stored hook_events.payload when head_sha is empty.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: internal/hooks/handler.go inserts hook_events and review_runs atomically; internal/hooks/handler_lifecycle_integration_test.go:368-405 asserts the stored payload retains deferred lookup fields and the created review_run keeps hook_event_id; .factory/library/architecture.md describes the webhook->run flow only at a high level.

summary: Pass. Reviewing both the original failing diff and the fix diff shows the prior blocking issues are addressed: real group MR deliveries now persist as hook_source=group at runtime, and logically distinct missing-head triggers no longer collapse onto one synthetic deferred idempotency key. I did not find any remaining blocking regression in the reviewed scope.
